name: ptah-extension-vscode
description: Complete visual interface for Claude Code CLI with chat, command building, and intelligent context management

ptah.mcpPort.markdownDescription: Port number for Ptah MCP server (default: 51820). Change if port conflicts occur. **Requires extension reload to take effect.**

enumDescriptions: Opus 4.5 - Most capable for complex work
ptah.model.selected.markdownDescription: Default Claude model for new chat sessions.

ptah.autopilot.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable autopilot mode to auto-approve certain actions.

enumDescriptions: Manual - Approval required for each action (safest)
Auto-edit - Auto-approve file edit and write operations
Full Auto (YOLO) - Skip ALL permission prompts (dangerous)
ptah.autopilot.permissionLevel.markdownDescription: Permission level when autopilot is enabled.

enumDescriptions: Use Claude Code OAuth token (recommended for free users)
Auto-detect: Try OAuth first, then API key
ptah.authMethod.markdownDescription:
Authentication method for Claude API.

**OAuth Token**: Get from [Claude Code Setup](https://claude.com/claude-code)

**API Key**: Get from [Anthropic Console](https://console.anthropic.com/)

ptah.claudeOAuthToken.markdownDescription:
Claude Code OAuth token (starts with `sk-ant-oat01-`).

Leave empty to use environment variable `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN`.

**Get token**: [Claude Code Setup](https://claude.com/claude-code)

ptah.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription:
Anthropic API key (starts with `sk-ant-api03-`).

Leave empty to use environment variable `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

**Get API key**: [Anthropic Console](https://console.anthropic.com/)
